panels.description: Medium shot of the narrator, an intelligent traveler, standing in a field of ruins, clutching his chin in deep contemplation, expressions of sudden epiphany, soft sunlight filtering through ancient stone structures.

bubbles.text: The pieces are falling into place. The towers, the wells, the bronze gates... a subterranean civilization.

panels.description: Close up shot focusing on a conceptual sketch drawn in the dirt by the narrator: the silhouette of a pale, large-eyed creature in a dark tunnel, juxtaposed with the outline of an owl's eye, emphasizing evolutionary adaptation to darkness.

bubbles.text: A second species. Pale skin, large eyes for the dark... like a cave fish or an owl. They are physically adapted to the deep.

panels.description: Wide panoramic shot of the landscape showing the hill slopes riddled with mysterious ventilating shafts and dark wells, atmospheric perspective, cold morning mist.

bubbles.text: The earth is hollowed out beneath my feet. An artificial Underworld, powering the comfort of those who dwell in the light.

panels.description: Medium shot of the narrator gesturing wildly as if explaining to an unseen audience, back-lit by the sun, showing the contrast between his intellectual intensity and the quiet, decaying garden setting behind him.

bubbles.text: It is the logical conclusion of the class divide: The Capitalist and the Labourer, separated not just by society, but by the very earth itself.
